name: discover_skills
desc: Search for workflow skills — complete recipes that bundle commands, tools, and step-by-step instructions for complex tasks. Skills are the primary authority for how to accomplish a task. Example: 'set up model filters and templates' returns the Filters skill with all steps.

parameters.name: objective
parameters.description: Describe what you want to accomplish — e.g. 'set up drainage for the building' or 'export drawing register to Excel'

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of skills to return (default 5)
